metadata.description: Private marketplace of operations plugins. House standards plus per domain toolkits.

plugins.name: house_standards
plugins.description: Shared tone and formatting standard for every operational report. Install alongside any domain plugin.

plugins.name: engineering_ops
plugins.description: Engineering operations toolkit. Ticket health, personal triage, research, and flow standards, with the morning report, daily personal brief, ticket research, and weekly leadership rollup commands. Depends on house_standards.

plugins.name: executive_ops
plugins.description: Executive operations toolkit. Board metrics standard and the monthly board pack command, with quarter-to-date OKR progress. Depends on house_standards.
